title: Mag 7 value shrinks by $2.3T amid AI spending jitters
abstract: Did you hear that Mag 7's value has shrunk by a staggering $2.3 trillion due to jitters in AI spending? It's like a stock market crash where everyone rushes to sell, dragging your investments down with it. Come see how to weather this wave!
abstract_zh: 你听说了吗？Mag 7的价值缩水了惊人的2.3万亿美元，全因为人工智能消费开始心慌了！就像是股市崩盘时，大家都急着抛售股票，连带着你的投资也要跟着“跳水”了。赶紧来看看这波浪潮怎么应对吧！
